title: HypurrCollective x Ambit Labs
summary_title: Ambit's HyperDrive: spot lending and tokenized vaults on Hyperliquid
summary_description: Ambit Labs brings a one-stop DeFi shop to Hyperliquid—lending against yield-bearing collateral, tokenized HLP vaults, and liquid staking.

key_moments.label: Hypercollectives mission: marketing and community for Hyperliquid
Cain introduces his 25-year engineering background, Terra/Anchor history
Matt: Anchor reached third-largest DeFi protocol before Terra collapse
HyperDrive: vertically integrated spot lending, tokenized HLP vaults
Why Hyperliquid: native perps and spot liquidity enable novel yield strategies
